<!--
  Heads up: the maintainer's README is explicit about not implementing
  requested features for other organizations. This is a reference
  implementation, not a generic tool. Feature requests that broaden the
  generic-tool surface area will likely be politely declined.

  Feature requests that improve the canonical environment's experience,
  fix a design discrepancy listed under `docs/project/discrepancies/`, or
  close an artifact in `docs/project/gaps/open/` are much more likely to
  land.
-->
